description: Retrieve a paginated list of all ACL rules on a site.

children.name: enforcingDeviceFilter
children.description: IDs of the Switch-capable devices used to enforce the ACL rule. When null, the rule will be provisioned to all switches on the site.

children.name: deviceIds
children.description: List of Switch capable device IDs to which the ACL rule will be provisioned.

children.name: index
children.description: ACL rule index. Lower index has higher priority

children.name: metadata
children.type: object (User defined or derived entity metadata)
children.description: Only user-defined rules can be deleted or modified

children.name: protocolFilter
children.description: Protocols this ACL rule will be applied to. When null, the rule will be applied to all protocols.

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules?offset=%7Boffset%7D&limit=%7Blimit%7D&filter=%7Bfilter%7D", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: List ACL Rules
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules"
    method: GET
    query:
      offset: "{offset}"
      limit: "{limit}"
      filter: "{filter}"
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules?offset=%7Boffset%7D&limit=%7Blimit%7D&filter=%7Bfilter%7D", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: List ACL Rules
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules"
    method: GET
    query:
      offset: "{offset}"
      limit: "{limit}"
      filter: "{filter}"
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
